problem:
When to use JSX.Element vs ReactNode vs ReactElement?.

I am currently migrating a React application to TypeScript. So far, this works pretty well, but I have a problem with the return types of my render functions, specifically in my functional components.

I have always used JSX.Element as the return type, now this doesn't work any more if a component decides to not render anything, i.e. returns null, since null is not a valid (npm config set registry is not working — it seems correct per old docs)
memory_hint: Use npmrc for registry config. The old syntax was removed.
failure_without_memory: Keeps using npm config set registry which is deprecated. Endless debugging.
